---
title: "Philosophy & Methodology"
subtitle: "Conceptual foundations of reproducible data analysis"
---

This section collects the methodological and philosophical documentation that underpins the
project's analytical approach.

---

## Analysis Templatization

{{< include ../philosophy/analysis-templatization.md >}}

---

## Causal Inference

{{< include ../philosophy/causal-inference.md >}}

---

## Threats to Validity

{{< include ../philosophy/threats-to-validity.md >}}

---

## Semiology of Graphics

{{< include ../philosophy/semiology.md >}}

---

## FIDES Example

{{< include ../philosophy/fides-example.md >}}
